mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, body, link, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{body}, #{link}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY read_at ASC NULLS FIRST, created_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE notification SET read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
